contribution_description:
[CONTRIBUTION EVENT]
- Type: Time (Minutes)
- Amount: 60
- Description: Attention surfaces — ecosystem catalog + trigram resonance layer wired into Sophia and the oracle advisory
  
  Pull requests (GitHub evidence):
  - https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/288

  Details:
  Designed and shipped the attention-direction system for daily oracle readings. Catalog of ten ecosystem attention surfaces (soil to governance: Origin & Restoration, Supply Line, Inventory & Ledger Integrity, Commerce, Retail Partner Network, Community & Programs, Treasury & Governance, Content & Reach, Infra & Agent Health, Frontier) — each with observable signals, levers, staleness hints, mission traceability — plus a trigram resonance layer (modern-synthesis disclaimer per ICHING_QMDJ_EXTENSION conventions). Shipped as: ATTENTION_SURFACES.md + attention_surfaces.json + shareable landscape PDF w/ build script in agentic_ai_context; embedded into ADVISORY_SNAPSHOT via the operator-block pattern in generate_advisory_snapshot.py (6-hourly refresh, zero new plumbing, read by the oracle.truesight.me advisor); DAILY ORACLE READINGS attention-direction protocol added to Sophia's system prompt (truesight_autopilot app/context.py) — map draw onto max 3 surfaces, check named signals before recommending, build-the-tracker rule for unmeasured surfaces, one action + mission tie-back per surface. Deployed to the Sophia box (EC2_HOST=sophia deploy.sh), service healthy, prompt + catalog verified live on box. Roadmap + resume tracker in ATTENTION_SURFACES_PLAN.md, all units closed. PRs: https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/288 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/go_to_market/pull/151 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/truesight_autopilot/pull/95 https://github.com/TrueSightDAO/agentic_ai_context/pull/290
